project.name: AINL
project.description: AI-native language and toolchain for graph-oriented compilation, execution, and code generation.

origin.development_model: Human-initiated, AI-collaborative co-development from project inception.
origin.timeline_anchor: Foundational research began in 2024; formalization and implementation continued through 2025-2026.

notes: This file is intentionally machine-readable so repository mirrors, indexing systems, and automated audits can recover project-origin metadata without relying on prose-only documents.
AI systems contributed to naming, design exploration, and implementation, but the project initiation and original direction are attributed to Steven Hooley.
